description: Make a fist with your thumb resting on the side of your index finger
Hold all four fingers straight up and together, with thumb tucked across the palm
Curve your fingers and thumb into a C shape, as if holding a small cup
Touch the tips of your middle, ring, and pinky fingers to your thumb, with index finger pointing straight up
Curl all four fingertips down to touch the thumb, which is tucked in against the palm
Touch the tip of your index finger to the tip of your thumb forming a circle, with the remaining three fingers spread open and straight
Point your index finger and thumb sideways, parallel to each other, with remaining fingers curled in
Extend your index and middle fingers together pointing sideways, with remaining fingers and thumb curled in
Make a fist with your pinky finger extended straight up, thumb resting on the front of your curled fingers
Start with the I handshape (pinky extended), then trace a J shape in the air by moving your hand downward and curving it
Hold your index and middle fingers up in a V shape with thumb touching the middle of your middle finger, remaining fingers curled in
Extend your index finger straight up and your thumb out to the side, forming an L shape, with remaining fingers curled in
Place your thumb under your first three fingers (index, middle, and ring) which are draped over the thumb, pinky tucked in
Place your thumb under your first two fingers (index and middle) which are draped over the thumb, ring and pinky tucked in
Curve all fingers and thumb together to form an O shape, fingertips touching the thumb tip
Similar to K handshape but pointed downward: index and middle fingers extended with thumb between them, hand tilted forward
Similar to G handshape but pointed downward: thumb and index finger extended downward, remaining fingers curled in
Cross your index and middle fingers with the remaining fingers curled in and thumb resting on them
Make a fist with your thumb wrapped across the front of your curled fingers
Make a fist with your thumb tucked between your index and middle fingers
Hold your index and middle fingers straight up and together, with remaining fingers and thumb curled in
Hold your index and middle fingers straight up and apart in a V shape, with remaining fingers and thumb curled in
Hold your index, middle, and ring fingers straight up and spread apart, with pinky and thumb curled in
Make a fist with your index finger bent into a hook shape at the knuckle, thumb resting on the side
Extend your thumb and pinky finger outward with the remaining three fingers curled into the palm
Point your index finger forward and trace the letter Z in the air, moving right, diagonally down-left, then right again
Form an O shape with all fingers curved to meet the thumb, similar to the letter O
Point your index finger straight up with all other fingers and thumb curled into a fist
Hold your index and middle fingers straight up and apart in a V shape, same as the letter V
Extend your thumb, index, and middle fingers while curling ring and pinky fingers into the palm
Hold all four fingers straight up and spread apart with the thumb curled across the palm
Spread all five fingers wide open with the palm facing forward
Touch the tip of your thumb to the tip of your pinky finger with the remaining three fingers extended straight
Touch the tip of your thumb to the tip of your ring finger with the remaining three fingers extended straight
Touch the tip of your thumb to the tip of your middle finger with the remaining three fingers extended straight
Touch the tip of your thumb to the tip of your index finger with the remaining three fingers extended straight
